name: Quick Turkey Nachos
recipeInstructions: In a skillet, brown the turkey and drain. Add taco seasoning and water; simmer for 15 minutes. Place tortilla chips on a greased baking sheet. Layer with turkey, sour cream, and salsa. Sprinkle with cheeses. Microwave or broil until cheese melts. Top with lettuce, tomatoes, and/or onions if desired. Note: Ground beef can be substituted for the ground turkey.
